thresholdSource: Endocrine marker; thyroid storm is diagnosed clinically (Burch-Wartofsky score), not by a specific total T4 cutoff — no citable acute critical value. plausibleHigh 30: above a documented survivor with total T4 >24.9 mcg/dL (ref 5.9-13.2 mcg/dL) during thyroid-storm-related encephalopathy in an adolescent with Graves' disease, who fully recovered after thyroidectomy (PMC7170342). Accuracy bound only. Draft — not clinician-approved.
